evidence: "This movie shows so much the truth of human nature and the world around us."
"It makes our ordinary everyday conflicts seem so petty."
"This movie deserves at least 4.5 average rating at Amazon."

"If you are like me and many other people who are more or less played by fate and are aware how much of your life is out of your control..."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for action and drama genres, appreciating complex narratives and fast pacing. They value high production quality and visual spectacle, indicating a taste for engaging and emotionally resonant content.
